message: It seems like the boss has a lot going on. Maybe this year is a tough year for the boss with women?
Well, Kristy, Meryl, Cindy, and Gloria are all bringing issues to the boss.
Every woman he meets has a problem to discuss with him.
Now that you mention it, that's true.
Please don't get all sentimental on me! You haven't even met the midwife Anna yet.
Ah, the problems just keep piling up.
Boss, pull yourself together! I'm really happy that this year seems like I can act like a detective.
So, please wrap up the requests quickly!
If you have time to warm the chair, go out and work!
Just let me have a cup of coffee.
